'''balasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonism|mnemonism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonism|mnemonism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| balasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bælæshæth|bælæshæth]] || [[word:bælæshæj|bælæshæj]] || [[word:bælæshæsh|bælæshæsh]] || [[word:bælæshæ|bælæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:balalashath|balalashath]] || [[word:balalashaj|balalashaj]] || [[word:balalashash|balalashash]] || [[word:balalasha|balalasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:balashath|balashath]] || [[word:balashaj|balashaj]] || [[word:balashash|balashash]] || [[word:balasha|balasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:balafshath|balafshath]] || [[word:balafshaj|balafshaj]] || [[word:balafshash|balafshash]] || [[word:balafshaf|balafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:balashatha|balashatha]] || [[word:balashaja|balashaja]] || [[word:balashasha|balashasha]] || [[word:balashaka|balashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:balashath|balashath]] || [[word:balashaj|balashaj]] || [[word:balashash|balashash]] || [[word:balasha|balasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:balashathal|balashathal]] || [[word:balashajal|balashajal]] || [[word:balashashal|balashashal]] || [[word:balashakal|balashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:balashathatha|balashathatha]] || [[word:balashajaja|balashajaja]] || [[word:balashashasha|balashashasha]] || [[word:balashaka|balashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:balashathan|balashathan]] || [[word:balashajan|balashajan]] || [[word:balashashan|balashashan]] || [[word:balashakan|balashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:balashathaoro|balashathaoro]] || [[word:balashajaoro|balashajaoro]] || [[word:balashashaoro|balashashaoro]] || [[word:balashakaoro|balashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
